name: Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VIII
summary: PART I . Overview HCIC is a newly organized special purpose acquisition company (a SPAC) incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company, on July 15, 2025, for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which is referred to throughout this Report as its initial business combination. The registration statement for HCICs initial public offering became effective on February 4, 20...
